title: Restore headers of optional information in 'podman pod ps'
body:
When optional information such as container IDs and names in pods, the headers are not displayed. This fix restored the headers from #8007.

Documentation of this subcommand is also updated.

Signed-off-by: Hironori Shiina <shiina.hironori@jp.fujitsu.com>

-->
